production_rules.name: termination_height
production_rules.inspection_prompt: Measure vertical height from roof plane to top of base flashing. Minimum 8 inches required.

production_rules.name: min_overlap
production_rules.citation: FM Global DS 1-29 / Manufacturer TPO/EPDM guide
production_rules.inspection_prompt: Measure lap width at 3 locations per 100 LF. Confirm against manufacturer minimum for membrane type.

production_rules.name: slope_to_drain
production_rules.inspection_prompt: Verify minimum 1/4 inch per foot slope toward each drain using level and tape at midpoint between drains.

production_rules.name: fastener_spacing
production_rules.citation: FM Global DS 1-29 / ASCE 7 Wind Uplift Table
production_rules.inspection_prompt: Count and measure fastener rows at field, perimeter, and corner zones against approved FM/UL assembly.

production_rules.name: air_barrier_continuity
production_rules.inspection_prompt: Visually trace air barrier from foundation to roof. Document all transitions, penetrations, and terminations. Flag any gap.

production_rules.name: vapor_barrier_continuity
production_rules.inspection_prompt: Inspect all vapor barrier laps for minimum 6-inch overlap with tape. Verify all penetrations are sealed.

production_rules.name: fireproofing_thickness
production_rules.citation: IBC 722 / UL Fire Resistance Directory / AISC Design Guide 19
production_rules.inspection_prompt: Use calibrated pin gauge per ASTM E605 grid pattern. Minimum 3 readings per member versus UL listing.

production_rules.name: board_joint_stagger
production_rules.citation: FM Global DS 1-29 Section 2.2 / NRCA Roofing Manual
production_rules.inspection_prompt: Verify insulation board joints offset minimum 6 inches between layers in both directions. No cross-joint alignment.

production_rules.name: movement_joint_clearance
production_rules.citation: NRCA Roofing Manual / Architect-of-Record structural drawings
production_rules.inspection_prompt: Measure structural gap width. Confirm cover width is minimum 2x gap. Verify cover not adhered both sides.

production_rules.name: drain_sump_depth
production_rules.inspection_prompt: Measure sump pan depth below surrounding roof plane at each drain. Minimum 1-inch depression required.
